nodes.name: 南里奥格兰德州
nodes.summary: 南里奥格兰德州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联89种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、Long-trained nightjar等89种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 湿地排水
nodes.summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。

nodes.name: 米纳斯吉拉斯州
nodes.summary: 米纳斯吉拉斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联94种鸟类，包括小拟䳍、孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍等94种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Marsh tapaculo
nodes.summary: Marsh tapaculo（Marsh tapaculo，学名 Scytalopus iraiensis），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于巴拉那州、南里奥格兰德州、米纳斯吉拉斯州，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括湿地排水。

nodes.name: 巴拉那州
nodes.summary: 巴拉那州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联35种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、Long-tailed potoo等35种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Until recently it was generally believed to be restricted to about two dozen sites in the eastern part of Paraná and Rio Grande do Sul, but has now been discovered in the highlands of Minas Gerais – far north of its previously known range. It occurs in seasonally flooded grassland in the floodplains of rivers

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Until recently it was generally believed to be restricted to about two dozen sites in the eastern part of Paraná and Rio Grande do Sul, but has now been discovered in the highlands of Minas Gerais – far north of its previously known range. It occurs in seasonally flooded grassland in the floodplains of rivers

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Threats include drainage, sand extraction, burning of grassland and the flooding of land due to the construction of dams
